Coursera Frequently Asked Questions

How can I apply for Coursera?

To register for the Coursera courses, you need to make an application from

MyKhas portal

within the specified dates. After your application is approved, the course access information will be delivered to you by e-mail.

Can I access the Coursera platform free?

If you aim to only use the platform and watch the courses for learning purposes, it may be possible. However

, if you want to earn credits for the courses, you must complete them within the specified time and upload the certificates.

Can I choose all the courses on Coursera, or is there only a specific list to choose from?

In the scope of the pilot program, only the courses in the specified

are counted as ECTS. However, you can still complete courses that are not on the list, but they will not be added to your academic credits.

To access the list, please visit:

.

How many Coursera courses can I take?

You can earn

up to 6 ECTS

credits by taking

a maximum of 150 hours

of Coursera courses and count them as free elective courses.

Can I take more Coursera courses?

Yes, however,

the course substitution is limited to 150 hours / 6 ECTS.

The additional courses you take are not added to your transcript; however, you can get certificates to use them for your own personal development.

Are the Coursera courses I take included in my maximum credit load for the semester?

are not included in your semester credit limit.

Therefore, you can take Coursera courses

in addition to the credits you are allowed to take for the semester

.

How can I earn credits for the courses I take on Coursera?

Each

25-hour

Coursera course is equal to

1 ECTS

.

For example:

25 hours of course = 1 ECTS

(Minimum)

75 hours of course = 3 ECTS

125 hours of course = 5 ECTS

150 hours of course = 6 ECTS

(Maximum)

The ECTS value corresponding to the total hours of the Coursera courses you have completed will appear on your transcript as

“KH-COURSERA Coursera Free Elective Course.”

The names and contents of the completed courses will not be listed separately on the transcript.

Note:

Course hours cannot be rounded

, and

at least 25 hours

of a course must be completed

to earn 1 ECTS credit

.

How many courses can I count as free elective courses at most?

Courses taken on Coursera can be counted as

a maximum of 1 free elective course.

Can the courses I take on Coursera be counted as compulsory / field elective courses?

No, Coursera courses can only be counted as

free elective courses

.

They are not counted as compulsory and free elective courses.

Can the courses I take on Coursera be counted towards my Double Major / Minor program?

The courses you take on Coursera will

primarily be credited towards your major program

. Upon the student’s request, these courses can also be counted as free elective courses in double major programs. However, since there is no free elective course status in minor programs, it will not be possible to count these courses towards the minor.

Can the courses taken on Coursera be credited instead of previously completed free elective courses?

Yes, they can be credited. The credit transfer requests must be applied within the period specified in the academic calendar.

Can I change the course I have chosen?

Yes, if you are within the registration period, you can change the course.

You can get support from MyKhas system or

[email protected]

.

Can I leave a course without completing it?

Yes, however, only the courses you

successfully complete and earn a certificate

will be credited.

The uncompleted courses do not have a negative impact.

Is there a time limit to complete the courses?

Yes,

you must complete the Coursera courses before the end of the academic year.

The course crediting process starts after you upload your certificates.

Are there any exams or assignments for Coursera courses?

Yes, some courses on the Coursera platform have exams or assignments. To earn a certificate, you need

to successfully complete these assessments.

It is requested of me to complete another course beforehand for the assignment of the course I have chosen. What should I do?

In this case you can:

Change the course

or,

Complete the course with the precondition

.

For more information, please contact

[email protected]

.

How will the grades for the courses I take on Coursera be reflected on my transcript?

Coursera courses

will be graded with a “G” (Pass) mark

. Therefore, they will not affect your

grade point

average (GPA)

. However, the courses you successfully complete are added to your credits.

Does a Coursera course affect the KHAS High Honor–Honor Scholarship?

No, a Coursera course does not affect the KHAS High Honor–Honor Scholarship.

Is there a limit for Coursera certificates?

No, there is no limit in earning certificates. You can complete as many Coursera courses as you wish and earn certificates.

Can I count the certificate I earned on the Coursera platform before the start of the pilot program as course credits?

No, only the courses completed during the access period provided by our university and courses completed in accordance with the specified rules can be credited. Coursera courses completed individually before the pilot program cannot be counted as course credits.
